channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Fear of Flying Clinic' helps anxious travelers back into the skies
item.description: For 50 years, a San Francisco-based group has created a space where fearful flyers can get supported exposure to air travel.

item.title: Gene therapy is transforming lives, but for many Americans it's hard to reach
item.description: Gene therapies have the potential to cure some diseases, but they are extraordinarily expensive. Location can also be a big hurdle for patients seekin...

item.title: China and the US alter foreign aid strategies
item.description: China's foreign aid strategy has shifted in the last few decades and now its model may be the one the US is adopting as China moves away from it.

item.title: Study Finds A Dangerous Gap in How We Measure Women's Heart Health
item.description: The plaque threshold is putting women's hearts at risk. Here's what to do about it

item.title: How The Gut-Brain Axis Really Works, According To A Gut Microbiome Expert
Hot Flashes, Mood Swings, & Sleepless Nights? This Natural Remedy Really Works
item.description: Looking for hormone support? I've got you.

item.title: 6 Ways To Protect Yourself From Eye Problems Once You Turn 40
item.description: Our eyes are microcosms of our overall health.

item.title: Good NewsâYou Actually *Can* Catch Up On Sleep, Experts Say
BAFTAs apologize after guest with Tourette syndrome uses racial slur during ceremony
item.description: A man with Tourette syndrome shouted a racial slur and other offensive remarks during the BAFTA awards ceremony Sunday. The BBC did not edit out his o...

item.title: The FDA creates a quicker path for gene therapies
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration aims to evaluate treatments for rare diseases based on plausible evidence that they would work â without requiring a ...

item.title: Tips for Making Exercise a Daily Habit
7 Nutrition Red Flags to Know About
item.description: Feeling unusually tired or noticing subtle changes in hair, nails, mood, or appetite? These signs may indicate nutrition gaps worth discussing with yo...

item.title: What Happens When Blood Sugar Falls Too Low
